inputs.titre: Début de la Renaissance italienne avec Giotto

reason: The image depicts a scene that appears to represent an artist, possibly Giotto, at work in his studio. The clothing, the architecture (stone walls, arched windows), the presence of pigments, parchment, and drawing tools all align with the 14th century. The ambiance of candlelight and shadows is appropriate. The large windows are believable for a 14th century workshop although large-scale glass manufacture was uncommon at the time. Some details, such as the precise style of pottery, might be slightly off, but overall the scene evokes the intended period.
